Try Free
Introducing 4x detail reconstruction

Upscale images
without losing detail

PixelLift reconstructs lost detail and texture from low-resolution photos — crisp faces, sharp text, clean edges. All in your browser.

Before · 480×360

After · 1920×1440

Trusted by fast-growing startups

Features

Empower your images with AI

Everything you need to turn low-resolution photos into crisp, high-resolution masterpieces.

AI Detail Reconstruction

Our model reconstructs lost detail and texture, not just stretches pixels — faces, text, and edges stay crisp.

Instant Upscale

2x or 4x in seconds, right in your browser.

Smart Denoise

Removes compression artifacts before enhancing.

Batch Ready

Queue multiple images and process them in one flow.

Private by Design

Images are processed locally in your browser. Nothing leaves your device.

0.0M+

Images upscaled

0.0s

Avg. processing

0K

Max resolution

0%

Happy creators

How it works

Simple. Seamless. Sharp.

Turn a blurry photo into a crisp masterpiece in four easy steps.

1

Upload your image

Drag in any JPG, PNG, or WebP. Up to 10MB.

2

Pick a scale

Choose 2x or 4x and toggle detail enhancement.

3

Enhance

Our engine reconstructs detail in seconds.

4

Download

Save the crisp result or keep it in your gallery.

Loved by creators

Don't take our word for it

Thousands of creators trust PixelLift to rescue and enhance their images.

PixelLift turned our product thumbnails from blurry to razor-sharp. Conversions jumped 18% in a month.

A

Alex Rivera

CTO at InnovateTech

I rescued a decade of low-res client photos. The detail reconstruction is genuinely impressive.

S

Samantha Lee

Marketing Director

We process thousands of images a week. PixelLift is the only tool that kept up without a server.

R

Raj Patel

Founder & CEO

The 4x upscale on old phone shots is uncanny. Faces stay clean instead of turning to mush.

M

Maya Chen

Photographer

Upscaled all my 512px textures to 2K. Saved me weeks of redoing art by hand.

T

Tom Wright

Indie Game Dev

Private-by-design was the selling point for us. No image ever leaves the browser.

Pricing

Pricing that scales with you

Start free. Upgrade when you need more power. Cancel anytime.

Free

Perfect for trying things out.

$0forever
  • 10 upscales / month
  • Up to 2x scale
  • PNG export
  • Gallery history
Popular

Pro

For creators and freelancers.

$12/ month
  • Unlimited upscales
  • Up to 4x scale
  • Detail enhancement
  • Batch processing
  • Priority queue

Enterprise

For teams and high volume.

Custom
  • Everything in Pro
  • API access
  • 8K resolution
  • SSO & audit logs
  • Dedicated support
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about upscaling with PixelLift.

PixelLift uses a high-quality resampling pipeline combined with detail reconstruction. It analyzes your image and rebuilds edges, textures, and fine detail that simple interpolation loses.

No. All processing happens locally in your browser using the canvas API. Your images never leave your device unless you choose to save them to your gallery.

You can upload JPG, PNG, and WebP files up to 10MB. Results are exported as high-quality PNG.

Batch processing is available on the Pro plan. Queue as many images as you like and process them in a single flow.

Free and Pro plans support up to 4x scaling. Enterprise supports up to 8K output resolution.

Ready to make your images sharp?

Upload your first image and see the difference in seconds. No signup required.

PixelLift

AI-powered image upscaling that turns low-resolution photos into crisp, high-resolution masterpieces.
